headline: Is It Too Late To Consider TJX Companies (TJX) After A 32.8% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether TJX Companies is still good value after a strong run, this article will walk through what the numbers actually say about the stock. The share price recently closed at US$159.71, with returns of 1.3% over 7 days, 6.6% over 30 days, 3.5% year to date, 32.8% over 1 year, 116.1% over 3 years, and 160.0% over 5 years. Recent news coverage has focused on TJX Companies as a major off price retailer and its role in the broader retail sector. There has also been ongoing...
